prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm light falls across an open palm and the rough grain of a wooden beam while a break of pale gold light widens in the dark beyond; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
A close view of a single nailed open hand against the rough grain of a cross beam, an iron nail through the palm, the fingers relaxed and open, a thin dark line of blood, the bearded face just beside it in shadow, and a break of pale gold light widening in the dark beyond the hand. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the nailed open hand against the beam, the break of light beyond.

Cut to macro detail — the iron nail through the palm.

Cut to insert — the relaxed, open fingers.

Cut to insert — the thin dark line of blood.

Cut to close-up — the bearded face beside the hand in shadow.

Cut to upper framing — the break of pale gold light widening in the dark.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the open, nailed hand before the breaking light.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
A way costly opened from the dark.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — nailed open hand against the beam, break of light beyond
Cut to macro detail — the iron nail through the palm
Cut to insert — the relaxed, open fingers

Cut to upper framing — the break of pale gold light widening in the dark
Return to full composition, end hold on the open nailed hand before the breaking light
